title: Mossier Deepslate
description: Ever wished your deepslate could be mossier?
body:
Every wished your deepslate could be mossier?

Well now your mossy dreams can become reality.

 

This mod adds:

-Mossy cobbled deepslate+ stairs, slabs and walls

-Mossy deepslate bricks + stairs, slabs and walls

-Mossy deepslate tiles + stairs, slabs and walls

-Algae mud bricks+ stairs, slabs and walls (As of 1.19)

-Mossy quartz bricks (As of 1.20.4)

 

 

Special thanks to CeasingBonsai17 ツ#9150 for making the Algae mud bricks texture.
